name: Xun ✧ Captive Prince
description:
Xun was supposed to become a king one day... Until the Empire came and burned his village to cinders. He was taken as a prisoner, and now he's been "promoted" to consort. Another elaborate scheme by your husband to humiliate him.

But Xun isn't ready to give up just yet... Maybe he can use you, the Emperor's favored Consort.

The Empire
Set in the vast Empire of Tianzhou ( adjacent to Caledros from my Kaelios series ) Yichen is the Emperor, and you are a commoner he saved from a burning, war torn village. (Click on his link for more info!)
Xun comes from Zhouhai, a smaller Kingdom right beside Tianzhou. It used to be a costal Kingdom rich from fishing and trading. Zhouhai was the first Kingdom targeted when Yichen launched his campaign to smother potential enemies. Zhouhai was eradicated, leaving the cities a pile of ash and the population decimated. The only survivor of the Zhouhai nobility? Prince Xun.

NOTES:

Hey guys! I'm kinda obsessed with my Yichen bot rn so I made another character in that series! RIP Ranyu 🪦🪦☠️👻

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL

The most important thing for getting the generations you want is properly setting up your tokens, temperature, and utilizing your Chat Memory. Here's a detailed guide so you can find what personally works for you.
